title: Locators - getByRole, getByLabel, getByText
description: Using semantic locators for robust element selection in tests.

title: Assertions - toBeVisible, toHaveText, toHaveCount
description: Auto-retrying assertions for reliable test verification.

title: Page Object Model Pattern
description: Encapsulating page interactions in reusable POM classes.

title: API Mocking with page.route()
description: Intercepting and mocking API requests for isolated testing.

title: Best Practices
description: Playwright testing best practices for resilient and maintainable tests.
content:
# Best Practices

1. **Use semantic locators** - getByRole > getByText > getByTestId > locator
2. **Avoid testing third-party deps** - Mock external APIs with page.route()
3. **Use web-first assertions** - expect(locator).toBeVisible() auto-retries
4. **Don't use manual waits** - Avoid page.waitForTimeout(), use assertions instead
5. **Test user-visible behavior** - Don't test implementation details
6. **Isolate tests** - Each test should be independent
7. **Use test.describe** for grouping related tests
8. **Use test.beforeEach** for shared setup (navigation, auth)
9. **Use test.skip/test.fixme** for known issues
10. **Use trace viewer** for debugging: `trace: 'on-first-retry'`

```javascript
// Good: semantic locator + auto-retry assertion
await expect(page.getByRole('heading', { name: 'Dashboard' })).toBeVisible();

// Bad: CSS selector + manual wait
await page.waitForTimeout(1000);
await page.locator('.header-title').isVisible();
```

Mock third-party APIs:
```javascript
await page.route('**/api/fetch_data_third_party', route => route.fulfill({
  status: 200,
  body: testData,
}));
```

**Category:** Guide
**URL:** https://playwright.dev/docs/best-practices

title: Custom Reporters
description: Configure built-in or custom test reporters in playwright.config.ts.
content:
# Test Reporters

Configure built-in or custom reporters.

```typescript
// playwright.config.ts
export default defineConfig({
  reporter: [
    ['html', {open: 'never'}],
    ['json', {outputFile: 'results.json'}],
    ['./my-awesome-reporter.ts'],
  ],
});
```

Built-in reporters:
- 'list' (default) - simple text list
- 'dot' - one char per test (pass/fail)
- 'line' - progress on single line
- 'html' - interactive HTML report
- 'json' - machine-readable JSON
- 'junit' - XML for CI systems
- 'github' - GitHub Actions annotations
- 'blob' - Playwright-specific format

Multiple reporters: use array syntax. Custom reporters: export class implementing Reporter interface with onBegin, onTestEnd, onEnd methods. Each test run generates report artifact.

**Category:** Configuration
**URL:** https://playwright.dev/docs/test-reporters
